title: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
company: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Consultant Physician with drive and ambition, GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
